description: Cost / ROI view for the Claude Code observability stack. Estimates return on Max-plan investment via shadow-cost vs plan-fee comparison. Cost values are approximations — see the 📌 Notes section.

panels.title: Total shadow cost (window)
panels.description: Sum of claude_code.cost.usage across selected users. NOT a bill — see Notes section.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| summarize ShadowCost = sum(Sum)

AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| summarize Users = dcount(tostring(_p['user.email']))

panels.title: Avg shadow cost per user/day
panels.description: Average daily shadow cost per active user. Rough sense of an individual's pace.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| extend email = tostring(_p['user.email']), day = bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize daily_total = sum(Sum) by email, day
| summarize AvgPerUserPerDay = round(avg(daily_total), 2)

panels.title: Break-even users (vs $max_plan_monthly_usd)
panels.description: Total shadow cost ÷ $max_plan_monthly_usd. 'This many people would have broken even on the Max plan if they were paying API rates instead.'

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| summarize total = sum(Sum)
| extend BreakEvenUsers = round(total / todouble(${max_plan_monthly_usd}), 2)
| project BreakEvenUsers

panels.title: Shadow cost over time
panels.description: Daily total shadow cost (selected users). Note: this is a delta-temporality metric — daily sum is meaningful, cumulative trend tells you usage growth.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| summarize ShadowCost = sum(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Per-user ROI (shadow cost vs Max plan fee)
panels.description: Per-user shadow cost compared to the configured Max plan monthly fee ($max_plan_monthly_usd). Delta = ShadowCost − MaxPlanFee. Positive (green) means the user's API-rate equivalent activity exceeded the Max fee — Max saved money. Negative (red) means the user didn't hit the break-even — Max overpaid for them. $max_plan_monthly_usd is editable at the top of the dashboard.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| extend email = tostring(_p['user.email'])
| summarize ShadowCost = round(sum(Sum), 2) by email
| extend MaxPlanFee = todouble(${max_plan_monthly_usd})
| extend Delta = round(ShadowCost - MaxPlanFee, 2)
| extend ROI_Status = case(
    Delta > 0,  "Max saved money",
    Delta < 0,  "Max overpaid",
    "break even")
| project email, ShadowCost, MaxPlanFee, Delta, ROI_Status
| order by Delta desc

panels.title: Shadow cost by model
panels.description: Where the shadow cost concentrates by model. Heavy Opus where Sonnet would do = optimization opportunity.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| extend model = tostring(_p['model'])
| summarize Cost = sum(Sum) by model
| order by Cost desc

panels.title: Token mix per user (input / output / cache)
panels.description: Token usage broken down by type. cacheRead-heavy = healthy reuse of context. Low cacheRead with high input = re-prompting from scratch repeatedly (paying for context every call).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "claude_code.token.usage"
| extend _p = parse_json(Properties)
| where tostring(_p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| extend email = tostring(_p['user.email']), type = tostring(_p['type'])
| summarize Tokens = sum(Sum) by email, type
| order by email asc, type asc

panels.title: Cost per prompt by user
panels.description: Shadow cost ÷ prompt count, per user. Outliers signal misuse, experimentation, or unusually expensive interaction patterns. Useful when paired with the User Profile dashboard for that user.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let _cost = AppMetrics
  | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
  | where Name == "claude_code.cost.usage"
  | extend p = parse_json(Properties)
  | extend email = tostring(p['user.email'])
  | where tostring(p['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
  | summarize ShadowCost = sum(Sum) by email;
let _prompts = AppTraces
  | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
  | where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "user_prompt"
  | extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email'])
  | where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
  | summarize Prompts = count() by email;
_cost
| join kind=inner _prompts on email
| extend CostPerPrompt = round(ShadowCost / todouble(Prompts), 4)
| project email, Prompts, ShadowCost = round(ShadowCost, 2), CostPerPrompt
| order by CostPerPrompt desc

options.content:
**Cost is an approximation, not a bill.**

`claude_code.cost.usage` is computed client-side by Claude Code at standard Anthropic API rates regardless of the user's actual plan (Max, pay-as-you-go API, AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex). For Max-plan users this is a *shadow cost* — what the same activity would cost at API rates. Don't reconcile against an invoice.

**API-vs-Max detection is not available from telemetry.**

Claude Code does not emit any auth-mode, plan-tier, or subscription attribute. There's no signal in the data that distinguishes an API-key user from a Max-plan user. The recommended audit pattern is out-of-band: maintain a roster of who's on Max, periodically diff against the distinct `user.email` values in `AppTraces`, flag anyone in telemetry not on the roster as 'probably API'.

**ROI math.**

The break-even calculation assumes `$max_plan_monthly_usd` is the monthly Max plan fee and that the dashboard window aligns with a monthly billing cycle. For windows longer than 30 days, the per-user ROI table compares the *full window* shadow cost to a single month's Max fee — adjust `$max_plan_monthly_usd` if you want a different comparison (e.g., set to 300 to compare against a quarter on Max).

See `CLAUDE_OBSERVABILITY.md` for Anthropic's own caveat on the cost metric.

list.name: law_resource
list.label: Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID
list.description: Paste the full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

list.name: users
list.label: Users
list.description: Multi-select. 'All' expands to every distinct user.email seen in the dashboard window.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email'])
| where isnotempty(email)
| distinct email
| order by email asc

list.name: max_plan_monthly_usd
list.label: Max plan monthly fee (USD)
list.description: Used for break-even and per-user ROI calculations. Edit to match your actual subscription cost.

title: Agent Observability — Cost / ROI

__inputs.name: DS_AZURE_MONITOR
__inputs.label: Azure Monitor
__inputs.description: Azure Monitor data source with access to the Log Analytics workspace.
